svg.text: Primary — use on white or light surfaces
Icon — use when space is limited
Don't stretch, rotate, or recolour the logo
Keep clear space equal to the "G" height around the logo
Use: H1, H2, H3, navbar, buttons, logo
Use: paragraphs, nav links, descriptions, forms
